datasets.description: ROCStories dataset for narrative understanding and commonsense reasoning
SQuAD v2 for reading comprehension with implicit facts
datasets.suitable_for: abductive reasoning to infer missing context facts

datasets.description: SciQ dataset for science question answering requiring multi-hop reasoning
Entailment Bank for abductive reasoning with chain-of-thought proofs
datasets.suitable_for: abductive reasoning with explicit proof chains

datasets.description: RuleTaker dataset for logical reasoning with rules and facts
datasets.suitable_for: abductive reasoning to infer missing rules/facts

datasets.description: ProofWriter dataset for logical reasoning with proofs
Hard logical reasoning dataset with FOL proofs

methodology.search_strategy: HuggingFace Hub search with keyword queries
methodology.selection_criteria: Downloads >100, has documentation, suitable for abductive reasoning evaluation
methodology.standardization: Unified JSON format with input/output structure
methodology.limitations: Some target datasets (original ROCStories, CLUTRR, CaseHOLD) have unsupported loader scripts in newer datasets library; used alternatives
